mapper.select: SELECT r.*, c.complex_name, c.legal_dong FROM rent_transaction r JOIN apt_complex c ON r.complex_id = c.complex_id JOIN ( SELECT complex_id, MAX(rent_id) AS max_id FROM rent_transaction GROUP BY complex_id ) latest ON r.rent_id = latest.max_id ORDER BY r.deal_year DESC, r.deal_month DESC, r.deal_day DESC LIMIT #{limit}
